lesson.title: 新概念英语 - 第1册 - 第039-040课Don't drop it!别摔了！

sections.text_en: What are you going to do with that vase, Penny?I’m going to put it on this table, Sam.Don’t do that.Give it to me.What are you going to do with it?I’m going to put it here, in front of the window.Be careful.Don’t drop it!Don’t put it there, Sam.Put it here, on this shelf.There we are!It's a lovely vase.Those flowers are lovely, too.
vocab: front n. 前面 in front of 在……之前 careful adj. 小心的，仔细的 vase n. 花瓶 drop v. 掉下 flower n. 花
sections.text_cn: 萨姆：你打算如何处理那花瓶？彭妮：我打算把它放在这张桌子上，萨姆。萨姆：不要放在那儿，把它给我。彭妮：你打算怎么办？萨姆：我准备把它入在这儿，放在窗前。彭妮：小心点！别摔了！彭妮：别放在那儿，萨姆。放在这儿，这个架子上。萨姆：这只漂亮的花瓶。彭妮：这些花也很漂亮啊。
